title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Gyukimaru, Kawamatsu, Kozuki Alliance, Toki, Zoro as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oi! Halt, you actual grave robbers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You bastard! Who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Umm... let's see... I'm-

dialogue.speaker: Gyukimaru
dialogue.text: I'm Gyukimaru! Of Bandit Bridge!

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Kappapa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WOOF!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Beyond here lies the heartland of Ringo! You shall not have the treasures of these tombs!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Leave your weapons here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: and begone!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Some time after that,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I went to the capital to procure food.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and certain circumstances prevented me from returning to Ringo.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You called yourself Gyukimaru? A coin- Cidence, I guess. Interesting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've caught the fried tofu thief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How careless of me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you here to see that Fox, then?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not think onimaru will return. He's probably run out of patience with me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, it has been 13 years... I doubt he's around at all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the swords we managed to hide together remain hidden,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They will be enough to outfit hundreds of soldiers, but...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZOROJURO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That big guy's gone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He left this door open and just ran off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How strange...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, shall we pursue him or enter here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the passage- way to that underground chamber.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PRRR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PRRR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gacha!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kinemon?

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Kawamatsu! I'm so glad you're still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happened at UDon probably swelled our ranks quite considerably,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you're having trouble find- ing enough weapons, am I right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: indeed! Well spotted! We're in a bind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that bas- tard orochi... over the last 20 years he's confiscated all the swords in the country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do not worry. No matter how many thousands of men join us,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of them shall be outfitted with a blade!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Are you serious?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Send men to the place I will now describe to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How in the world are there so many?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onimaru? Was this you? No, this is a man's work...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zorojuro...If your sword

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Really is the one known as Shusui,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Please, return it to Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Like I've said, it's mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I shall give you another in return!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A sword my late father gave to me.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The meitou enma!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The legendary sword said to be the only blade that has ever injured Kaido!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 50 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
